rows.label: qev030901_MSG0001
rows.name:
Why does happiness
make you want to tell someone about it so much, da?
It's a strange thing, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0002
rows.name:
Hey, listen to this!
Soon, Hexna Nebra and my child
will be born, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0003
rows.name:
Heh heh, I'm finally going to be a father, zo!
How about that! Amazing, right!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_JNK0010
rows.name: Congratulate[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_SEL0011
rows.name: Congratulate him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_JNK0020
rows.name: Reprimand[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_SEL0021
rows.name:
Warn him that since he now has something to protect,
he shouldn't be getting carried away.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0004
rows.name:
Thank you!
I'll raise them into a fine child
who brings no shame to the Tree Clan, zo! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0005
rows.name:
O-Oh... yeah...
Umm... you're a really serious guy, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0006
rows.name:
But you're right, the Growth are bastards who would take
even a child's life without hesitation, da.
As a father, I have to become stronger too, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0007
rows.name:
Aaah!! I want to see my child's face already, zo!
Hexna Nebra... do your best...! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Bazis Wolfen! It's terrible, na!
Grandpa!
Aldo Bergazas collapsed, and... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0009
rows.name:
He just breathed his last, na!
Uugh... Waaaaaaah!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0010
rows.name:
Aldo Bergazas... is dead, da?
Th-that can't be...
He was looking so energetic lately, wasn't he? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0011
rows.name:
...Hey, Liana.
Take me to where
Grandpa's body is! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ah... uugh...
Grandpa is sleeping in the plaza below, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0013
rows.name:
Understood!
...You there, Earthling! You're the one who helped out
with Nemard's wedding, right? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0014
rows.name:
If it's alright, could you come too?
There's something I want to ask of you regarding Grandpa, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0015
rows.name:
Aldo Bergazas...
He's sleeping with such a happy look on his face, zo... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0016
rows.name:
Nemard, who he was most worried about, got married too.
Does he feel like he has nothing left undone? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_JNK0030
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_SEL0031
rows.name: Nod, saying he must have had no regrets.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_JNK0040
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_SEL0041
rows.name:
Say it would have been even better if you could
have shown him his great-grandchild's face.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0017
rows.name:
Yeah, that's true...
The way Grandpa was celebrating so enthusiastically
at the wedding was something else... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0018
rows.name:
That guy Nemard...
At the very, very end, he performed the ultimate act
of filial piety for Grandpa, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0019
rows.name:
I wanted to show Grandpa
my child's face too, zo... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0020
rows.name:
Yeah...
I wanted to show Grandpa
my child's face too, zo... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0021
rows.name:
Grandpa Aldo...
Let me perform an act of filial piety for you too,
not just Nemard... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0022
rows.name:
...Ah, that's right.
About that thing I wanted to ask of you... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0023
rows.name:
Listen, I want you to help out with Grandpa's funeral
that we're going to hold, da.
You helped out with Nemard's wedding too, right? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0024
rows.name:
I really want to do it for him myself, but
I... have to stay by Hexna Nebra's side,
so... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0025
rows.name:
Please...!
I want you to deliver Grandpa's soul
into the greatest beast! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0026
rows.name:
Thank you, na.
Then, ask my Dad... Galba Vassago
for the details. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0027
rows.name:
I'm going back to Hexna Nebra, zo.
If I don't... I feel like Grandpa would
get angry at me, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0028
rows.name:
Nngh... Hexna's condition has worsened, zo.
This might be a difficult birth, na... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0029
rows.name:
Hexna Nebra... do your best...
The soul of Aldo Bergazas
is standing by your side, zo... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0030
rows.name:
We did it! We did it, zo!!
She was born perfectly and splendidly, da!
The beloved child of me and Hexna! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0031
rows.name:
Everything below the head just wouldn't come out,
and they told me we might lose them both, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0032
rows.name:
But suddenly Hexna's condition improved...
I'm sure Grandpa Aldo helped us, da.
Na? That has to be it, right? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_JNK0050
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_SEL0051
rows.name: Smile and say that must definitely be it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_JNK0060
rows.name: Deny[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_SEL0061
rows.name: Say that it was thanks to Hexna doing her best.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0033
rows.name: Thank you, Grandpa... [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0034
rows.name:
I see... that's right, na!
First of all, I need to tell Hexna
that she did a great job, na! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0035
rows.name:
She was screaming with an incredible voice, but
she did her best without uttering a single word of complaint, da! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0036
rows.name:
...Right, what happened with the funeral?
Were you able to safely offer him to a beast? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0037
rows.name:
...What did you say!?
He was eaten by that
Garuda Hastara!? [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0038
rows.name:
Th... that is amazing, zo!!
My daughter is going to inherit
an unbelievable name, na!! [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0039
rows.name:
Ah... you see, we children of Bias
inherit the name of the soul returned to a beast
that was closest to us, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0040
rows.name:
So that the soul of the deceased, and the beast
that soul resides in, will protect us, na. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0041
rows.name:
Ha ha!
The strongest Grandpa and the strongest beast
will be watching over her, da. [ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev030901_MSG0042
rows.name:
My daughter, Henna Hastara,
is invincible, zo!
I... will raise her into a splendid daughter, zo! [ST:wait ]
